---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so we can fix it
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots or a short screen recording to help explain the problem.

## Device info
- Device: [e.g. Samsung A32, iPhone 13, desktop]
- OS: [e.g. Android 14, iOS 17, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 130, Safari 17]
- App version / commit: [e.g. 1.0.0 or git SHA]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here (network conditions, language setting, logged-in vs guest, etc.).
